title: micranthemum glomeratum
intro: Micranthemum glomeratum, also known as Rambling Speedwell, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. Its health benefits include treating various ailments such as colds, fever, and sore throats, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of Micranthemum glomeratum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be applied topically to the affected area or ingested to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
